Seoul
Tech & Culture
Tour 2026

A five-day academic immersion into Korea's innovation ecosystem — from world-class universities to Seoul's smart-city control center.

Han River at Night · Seoul

18-22 May 2026
5 Days
Academic Visits
6 Venues
About the Tour

Where technology
meets culture .

T he Seoul Tech & Culture Tour 2026 took place from 18-22 May 2026 and offered students a five-day academic and cultural immersion designed by the Department of Computer Science at City University of Hong Kong.

Our itinerary covered Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU), KAIST AI Graduate Lab, Korea University, Yonsei University, Seoul Gallery, Seoul TOPIS (Seoul Transport Operation and Information Service), with sessions focused on academic exchange, smart-city systems, and cross-cultural learning.

Read the full story →
